name: Tortellini Meat Filling
recipeIngredient: 4 pounds Cooked veal, pork or chicken
1 cup All-purpose broth (or low-sodium chicken broth)
recipeInstructions:
1. DEFROST THE COOKED MEAT, if necessary.
2. Heat oil in a medium skillet or frying pan over medium heat.
3. Add onion, garlic, oregano and coriander and cook, stirring, for 5 minutes.
4. Add the flour and mix well.
5. Gradually add the broth and meat, stirring until the mixture thickens and bubbles.
6. Stir in the salt and pepper. Remove from heat.
7. Scrape into a bowl.
8. Place uncovered in refrigerator to cool.
9. Stuffing can be stored, covered, in refrigerator for up to 5 days.
10. To freeze, place 1-cup amounts of stuffing in airtight freezer bags or containers, label and place in freezer for up to 3 months.
Makes 6 Cups Filling
